context.---REQUIRED BEFORE FIRST DEPLOY---: Fill in the two values below. Bootstrap with: cdk bootstrap aws://ACCOUNT/eu-central-1
context.---SSM SECRETS (eu-central-1)---: aws ssm put-parameter --region eu-central-1 --name /lifesim/anthropic-api-key --type SecureString --value sk-ant-... && aws ssm put-parameter --region eu-central-1 --name /lifesim/alpha-access-key --type SecureString --value your-key
context.---ACM CERT NOTE---: certificateArn must point to a certificate in us-east-1 (CloudFront requirement), even though everything else is in eu-central-1
